flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Schenectady County Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.5k vs 2.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Schenectady County Community College rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.0k → $3.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Schenectady County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Schenectady County Community College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.4k → $9.0k).
